updateInterval_help: How often to fetch data (in minutes), Attention!!! If disabled, you will need to create a cron job for the instance yourself
name: Name
location_help: Tip: Azimuth -180° = North, -90° = East, 0° = South, 90° = West, 180° = North. Tilt 0° = horizontal, 90° = vertical
locationsTotal_label: Create peak total of all locations
locationsTotal_help: If enabled, additional states will be created that sum up the values of all locations. This can be useful if you have multiple locations and want to see the overall forecast at a glance.
